name: Allied World Assurance Company Holdings, AG
name_former: Allied World Assurance Company Holdings, Ltd
description: Allied World Assurance Company Holdings, AG, through its subsidiaries, is a global provider of property, casualty, and specialty insurance and reinsurance solutions. Founded in 2001, the company offers a diversified portfolio of products and services to clients worldwide, operating through a global network of offices in North America, Europe, and the Asia-Pacific region. Allied World is known for its underwriting expertise, risk management services, and strong financial ratings, and it operates as a subsidiary of Fairfax Financial Holdings Limited.
